items.headline: हांगकांग: उद्योगपति जिमी लाई को 20 साल जेल की सज़ा
whyItMatters: इमेज स्रोत, AMIT KUMAR उत्तर प्रदेश के कानपुर में दिल्ली रजिस्टर्ड लेम्बोर्गिनी कार ने कई लोगों को टक्कर मार दी. इसमें कम से कम तीन व्यक्तियों के घायल होने की ख़बर है. प्रत्यक्षदर्शियों के मुताबिक़ रव
summaryParagraphs: इमेज स्रोत, AMIT KUMAR उत्तर प्रदेश के कानपुर में दिल्ली रजिस्टर्ड लेम्बोर्गिनी कार ने कई लोगों को टक्कर मार दी. इसमें कम से कम तीन व्यक्तियों के घायल होने की ख़बर है. प्रत्यक्षदर्शियों के मुताबिक़ रविवार शाम को ग्वालटोली थाने के रेव के पास काले रंग की कार ने पहले ऑटो फ़िर बाइक सवार एक व्यक्ति को टक्कर मार दी थी. इसके बाद कार डिवाइडर पर चढ़ गई, जिसमें कुछ और लोगों को चोट लगी है. घटना में घायल विशाल त्रिपाठी ने मीडिया को बताया, "हम बाइक स्टैंड पर लगाकर खड़े थे. तभी पीछे से आवाज़ आई, पलटकर देखा तो गाड़ी पहले ऑटो से टकराई." "फ़िर हमारी बाइक को टक्कर मारते हुए आगे खड़े लोगों से टकरा गई. दो लोग अस्पताल गए हैं. बाकी हम लोगों को चोट लगी है. हमने थाने में तहरीर दी है." उन्होंने कहा, "शीशा तोड़कर कार चालक को निकाला गया है. ये कार शिवम मिश्रा चला रहे थे." कानपुर के पुलिस उपायुक्त सेंट्रल अतुल श्रीवास्तव ने मीडिया से कहा, "कानपुर के ग्वालटोली थाना क्षेत्र का मामला है. कार अनियंत्रित हो गई और सड़क किनारे खड़े लोगों को टक्कर मारते हुए कई गाड़ियों से टकरा गई." For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: MCX Lead Futures: Volatility persists, but supports may limit downside
whyItMatters: + 482.11 + 164.25  -130.00 + 2,144.00 + 11,451.00 + 482.11 + 164.25 + 164.25  -130.00  -130.00 + 2,144.00 Lead prices have been volatile over the
summaryParagraphs: + 482.11 + 164.25  -130.00 + 2,144.00 + 11,451.00 + 482.11 + 164.25 + 164.25  -130.00  -130.00 + 2,144.00 Lead prices have been volatile over the last couple of weeks. The Lead Futures contract traded on the Multi-Commodity Exchange spiked to a high of ₹207.40 per kg by the end of January and then fell sharply to a low of ₹183.70 immediately. The bounce from this low seems to lack strength, as the price comes down again from around ₹195. The MCX Lead Futures contract is currently trading at ₹189.50. The immediate outlook is slightly weak. Supports are at ₹186 and ₹184, which can be tested in a day or two. However, a fall beyond ₹184 is less likely. We can expect the MCX Lead Futures contract to bounce back from this ₹186-184 region and go up to ₹190 or ₹192. The ₹192 level is a key resistance. A strong break above it will then lead to an extended rise to ₹196-197 over the next week or two. In case the contract breaks below ₹184, it For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: Gold, silver extend gains on softer dollar; investors eye US economic data
whyItMatters: + 509.03 + 162.75  -118.00 + 2,069.00 + 11,734.00 + 509.03 + 162.75 + 162.75  -118.00  -118.00 + 2,069.00 Gold and silver extended gains on Monda
summaryParagraphs: + 509.03 + 162.75  -118.00 + 2,069.00 + 11,734.00 + 509.03 + 162.75 + 162.75  -118.00  -118.00 + 2,069.00 Gold and silver extended gains on Monday, ​with the former trading just above the $5,000-per-ounce level as the dollar dipped, while investors awaited key jobs and inflation data due later in the week to gauge U.S. interest rate trajectory. Spot gold rose 1.1% to $5,012.76 per ounce by 0502 GMT after a 4% climb on Friday. U.S. gold ​futures for April delivery gained 1.1% to $5,033.80 per ounce. "This ⁠could be the very short-term intraday correlation between the dollar and silver as well as gold (driving the metals up)," said Kelvin Wong, a senior ​market analyst at OANDA. The ⁠U.S. dollar was at its lowest level since February 4, making greenback-priced metals cheaper for overseas buyers. The yen strengthened after Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi swept to victory in Sunday's election. "Bargain-huntin For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: Apparel industry lauds India-US interim trade agreement, call it "father of all deals"
whyItMatters: + 509.03 + 162.75  -118.00 + 2,069.00 + 11,734.00 + 509.03 + 162.75 + 162.75  -118.00  -118.00 + 2,069.00 Chairman of the Apparel Export Promotio
summaryParagraphs: + 509.03 + 162.75  -118.00 + 2,069.00 + 11,734.00 + 509.03 + 162.75 + 162.75  -118.00  -118.00 + 2,069.00 Chairman of the Apparel Export Promotion Council, A Sakthivel, hailed the India-US interim trade agreement as a landmark moment for the Indian apparel industry, which has been struggling under US tariffs . Speaking to ANI on Sunday, he noted that the sector had been facing significant challenges over the past six months due to 25% US tariffs, which had caused considerable turmoil among exporters. "This is a big moment for the Apparel sector . We call it the father of all deals. We have been in turmoil for the past six months due to 25% penalties. The moment a saturation point was reached, this deal was announced. This is a win-win situation for both countries. This deal took time because our government wanted to safeguard the interests of our citizens, especially farmers," A Sakthivel said. KM Subramanian, President o For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: Indian startup moves Belagavi court in Anthropic name row
whyItMatters: + 509.03 + 162.75  -118.00 + 2,069.00 + 11,734.00 + 509.03 + 162.75 + 162.75  -118.00  -118.00 + 2,069.00 Anthropic Software Private Limited, a B
summaryParagraphs: + 509.03 + 162.75  -118.00 + 2,069.00 + 11,734.00 + 509.03 + 162.75 + 162.75  -118.00  -118.00 + 2,069.00 Anthropic Software Private Limited, a Belagavi-based technology company, has moved the Commercial Division of the District Court at Belagavi against US-based Anthropic PBC over the use of the name “Anthropic” in India. The Indian company was founded in 2017 and operates digital platforms across education, connectivity, and safety domains. It develops an AI-enabled education enterprise resource planning and competitive examination ecosystem, a Wi-Fi monetisation platform and a patented driving safety solution. The company works with government bodies, educational institutions and student communities across India, including those from economically weaker sections. Anthropic PBC was incorporated in the United States in 2021 and announced its entry into India in 2025. Anthropic Software has alleged passing off and misrepresentation For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

A sustained rise above 60,850 is needed to strengthen the bullish case for a rise to 61,500. We will have to wait and watch what happens. This has given some relief for the index. The advances/declines ratio is at 37:13 and is positive. This has to sustain to avoid the index losing its momentum. Intraday support is at 25,720-25,700. Failure to rise back immediately can drag the index down to 25,720 during the day. But thereafter we can expect the Nifty to reverse higher and go back up to 25,850 again. A decisive break above 25,850 will then clear the way for a further rise to 26,000 and higher. Nifty will come under more selling pressure only if it breaks below 25,700. items.headline: ‘Safety-first’ mindset accelerates transition of high-end technologies in mass-market vehicles: Techarc report
whyItMatters: + 338.38 + 107.90  -109.00 + 1,869.00 + 12,661.00 + 338.38 + 107.90 + 107.90  -109.00  -109.00 + 1,869.00 The Indian passenger vehicle (PV) secto
summaryParagraphs: + 338.38 + 107.90  -109.00 + 1,869.00 + 12,661.00 + 338.38 + 107.90 + 107.90  -109.00  -109.00 + 1,869.00 The Indian passenger vehicle (PV) sector has reached a definitive strategic turning point and ‘safety-first’ consumer shift has accelerated the transition of high-end safety technologies into mass-market segments, a report has said. According to a report by independent firm Techarc titled - AutoTech PV Dashboard, technology transitioned from a peripheral luxury to the primary technological payload driving the consumer experience in 2025. Modern Original Equipment Manufacturers (OEMs) are increasingly utilising AutoTech scores, a proprietary metric measuring consumer-facing technologies across performance, safety, and connectivity, to differentiate their offerings in a market undergoing structural recovery, said the report. A “safety-first” consumer shift has also made Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS) a competitive nece For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

summaryParagraphs: Former Tesla AI director Andrej Karpathy has introduced "agentic engineering" for the next phase of AI-driven software development. This approach involves AI agents autonomously generating and refining code, with humans acting as orchestrators and supervisors. Karpathy predicts this will become a central part of software development by 2026. For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Times of India.

summaryParagraphs: A private bus helper, 25-year-old Sunil Sharma, was found dead after a fire erupted in a vehicle in West Delhi's Vikaspuri area early Sunday. items.headline: Claude 'changes' its 'home page' to make fun of Sam Altman's ChatGPT
whyItMatters: Anthropic's AI assistant Claude now prominently features 'ad-free chats' on its welcome page. This move follows recent advertisements from Anthropic that humorously pointed out the intrusion of ads wi
summaryParagraphs: Anthropic's AI assistant Claude now prominently features 'ad-free chats' on its welcome page. This move follows recent advertisements from Anthropic that humorously pointed out the intrusion of ads within AI conversations. The company emphasizes its commitment to providing a helpful and uninterrupted user experience. This latest development continues Anthropic's public campaign to differentiate itself from competitors like OpenAI. For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Times of India.
